homeworkSet.title: תרגיל בית 3
homeworkSet.backgroundStory:
בתרגיל זה, עליכם לבנות מסד נתונים הקשור לניהול מערכת סטודנטים וקורסים במכללה. הנכם מגלמים תפקיד של מנהל/מנהלת מערכת קורסים במכללה האחראי/ת על ניהול קורסים, סטודנטים, מרצים ונרשמים לקורסים. מסד הנתונים שלכם יכלול 4 טבלאות:

1) מידע על הסטודנטים:
Students (StudentID, FirstName, LastName, BirthDate, City, Email)

2) מידע על הקורסים:
Courses (CourseID, CourseName, Credits, Department)

3) מידע על המרצים:
Lecturers (LecturerID, FirstName, LastName, City, HireDate, CourseID, Seniority)

4) מידע על נתוני הנרשמים:
Enrollments (StudentID, CourseID, EnrollmentDate, Grade)

עמודת credits מייצגת את כמות נקודות הזכות שהסטודנט יקבל בסיום הקורס.

694ccf76e1c73626dbe9b837.sql:
select firstname, lastname
from students join enrollmens
using (studentid)
where grade >=ALL (select max(grade) from enrollmens)

695c9ecad574119fd5c0c10a.sql:
select studentid, firstname, lastname
from students

feedback.instructorNotes: השאילתה חסרה JOIN עם טבלת ההרשמות ולא כוללת את כל העמודות הנדרשות. יש לבצע התאמה לשאילתה המלאה ולוודא שהנתונים המוצגים תואמים לדרישות השאלה.

695c9ecad574119fd5c0c10a.sql:
select Students.StudentID,Concat(FirstName,' ',LastName) as 'Student Name',CourseID,EnrollmentDate
from Enrollments join Students
on Enrollments.StudentID=Students.StudentID
where EnrollmentDate between '2025-10-26' and '2026-01-13'
order by CourseID;

feedback.autoNotes: Query executed successfully but returned no results.
feedback.instructorNotes: לשים לב לא להשתמש בטווח תאריכים סטטי כאשר מדובר על טווח תאריכים (סמסטר אחרון) - מינוס 1

695c9ecad574119fd5c0c10c.sql:
select
  Students.StudentID,
  Students.FirstName,
  Students.LastName,
  avg(Enrollments.Grade) as AvgGrade
from Students join Enrollments on Students.StudentID = Enrollments.StudentID
group by Students.StudentID, Students.FirstName, Students.LastName
having avg(Enrollments.Grade) = 
(
  select max(AvgGrade)
  from 
  (
    select avg(Grade) as AvgGrade
    from Enrollments
    group by StudentID
  ) 
);

from Courses join Lecturers
on Lecturers.CourseID = Courses.CourseID
where Courses.Department = 'Computer Science' and Lecturers.Seniority >= 7
order by Courses.Credits ASC;

695c9ecad574119fd5c0c110.sql:

    from Enrollments
) ;

having count(distinct LecturerID)>=3;

695c9ecad574119fd5c0c114.sql:
select Courses.CourseID,Courses.CourseName,sum(EnrollmentDate>='2023-01-01') as NumStudents2023,sum(EnrollmentDate>='2023-01-01')/count(*) *100 as Percent2023
from Courses join Enrollments
on Courses.CourseID = Enrollments.CourseID
group by Courses.CourseID,Courses.CourseName;

feedback.instructorNotes: השאילתה לא מחזירה את מספר הסטודנטים הנכון, מאחר והשימוש ב-sum עם תנאי לא נכון. כמו כן, החישוב של האחוזים לא מתבצע כראוי.

695c9ecbd574119fd5c0c11e.sql:
select Students.StudentID,Students.FirstName,Students.LastName,Students.City,Courses.CourseName,Lecturers.FirstName,Lecturers.LastName
from Students join Enrollments
on Students.StudentID=Enrollments.StudentID
join Courses
on Enrollments.CourseID=Courses.CourseID
join Lecturers
on Courses.CourseID= Lecturers.CourseID
where Students.City=Lecturers.City;

695c9ecbd574119fd5c0c120.sql:
select Students.StudentID,Students.FirstName,Students.LastName,avg(Enrollments.Grade) AS AvgGrade
from Students join Enrollments
on Students.StudentID=Enrollments.StudentID
join Courses
on Enrollments.CourseID=Courses.CourseID
where Courses.Department='Computer Science'
group by Students.StudentID,Students.FirstName,Students.LastName
having avg(Enrollments.Grade)>(
    select avg(Enrollments.Grade)
    from Enrollments
    join Courses
    on Enrollments.CourseID=Courses.CourseID
    where Courses.Department='Computer Science'
);

695c9ecbd574119fd5c0c122.sql:
select Courses.CourseID,Courses.CourseName,avg(Enrollments.Grade) as AvgGrade,count(Enrollments.StudentID) as NumStudents
from Courses join Enrollments
on Courses.CourseID=Enrollments.CourseID
group by Courses.CourseID,Courses.CourseName
order by AvgGrade DESC
limit 3;

feedback.instructorNotes: השאילתה של הסטודנט נכונה ומדויקת, היא משתמשת בפקודות מותרות ומביאה את התוצאות הנדרשות בהתאם לסכמה הצפויה. השאילתה כתובה בצורה ברורה וקריאה.

695c9ecad574119fd5c0c116.sql:
select
(
  select Students.City
  from Students join Enrollments on Students.StudentID = Enrollments.StudentID join Courses on Courses.CourseID = Enrollments.CourseID
  where Courses.CourseName = 'Database'
  order by Enrollments.Grade
  limit 1
)
is not null and
(
  select City
  from Lecturers
  order by Seniority DESC
  limit 1
)
is not null and
(
  select Students.City
  from Students join Enrollments on Students.StudentID = Enrollments.StudentID join Courses on Courses.CourseID = Enrollments.CourseID
  where Courses.CourseName = 'Database'
  order by Enrollments.Grade ASC
  limit 1
)
=
(
  select City
  from Lecturers
  order by Seniority DESC
  limit 1
) as Answer;

695c9ecbd574119fd5c0c118.sql:
select Students.StudentID,Enrollments.Grade * 1.10 as UpdatedGrade,CoursesCS.Department
from Students join Enrollments 
on Students.StudentID=Enrollments.StudentID
join Courses CoursesCS
on Enrollments.CourseID=CoursesCS.CourseID
where CoursesCS.CourseName='Introduction to CS' and CoursesCS.Department = 'Computer Science' and Students.StudentID in 
(
    select Enrollments.StudentID
    from Enrollments join Courses
    on Enrollments.CourseID = Courses.CourseID
    where Courses.CourseName = 'Calculus I'
  )
order by UpdatedGrade DESC, CoursesCS.Department ASC;
